name: Zurich Marató Barcelona
summary: A fast, flat urban marathon through Barcelona's iconic streets, starting on Passeig de Gràcia and finishing at Passeig de Lluís Companys next to the Arc de Triomf.
heroNote: Great cheering spots along Passeig de Gràcia near the start, in the Eixample and Ciutat Vella streets around the halfway mark, along the seafront in Poblenou and Diagonal Mar, and at the Arc de Triomf finish.
